name: Easy Barbecued Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large sheet-type pan with 1-2 inch sides.
2. Add the juice from 1-1/2 lemons to the melted butter.
3. Stir in the chopped garlic cloves.
4. Place the shrimp and lemon slices in the pan.
5. Sprinkle the shrimp and lemon slices with paprika and garlic salt.
6. Broil the shrimp until they turn pink and firm (usually 10-15 minutes), stirring occasionally.
7. Serve with French bread for dipping.
